name: Shower Rooms
description: Hot water, private cubicles and luxury amenities to freshen up post-match.

name: Locker Rooms
description: Secure digital-lock lockers — leave your valuables worry-free while you play.

name: Café & Lounge
description: Post-match drinks, light bites, and social vibes in our stylish in-club café.

name: Parking Area
description: Ample, secure parking for cars and motorcycles — complimentary with booking.

name: Equipment Rental
description: High-quality padel rackets and balls available for rent at the front desk.

name: Pro Shop
description: Premium padel gear, apparel and accessories from top-tier brands.

name: Free WiFi
description: High-speed WiFi throughout the club — stream, share, and stay connected.

name: Changing Rooms
description: Spacious, spotless changing rooms with full-length mirrors and premium fixtures.
